resources.string:
Sorry, the app has crashed.

Please copy the content below and report this issue on github, remove any sensitive information before reporting.
When enabled, the SMS content will also be logged in the database and displayed in this list, it will not be logged in database when disabled.
Translations are generated using AI, corrections are welcome.

Allow repeated calls, they are more likely to be urgent than spam.

By default, the second call within 5 minutes will be allowed.

Options:

- <b>Max Interval</b>
Only calls within this timeframe are considered as repeats.

- <b>Min Interval</b>
If a number calls again sooner than this, it will be ignored. Spam bots usually redial instantly, in that case, increase this value. Setting the blocking mode to \"Silence\" can also help, check its tooltip for details.

- <b>Repeat Times</b>
The minimal repeat times.
For example:
When set to 2, a call must repeat twice. In total, it takes three calls:
  - ignore
  - ignore
  - allow

- <b>Include SMS</b>
When enabled, receiving SMS messages from that number also counts.

Priority: 10
Only %s milliseconds since last call from this number, required minimum is %s milliseconds, ignore.
This app may not work correctly within work profile, please install it in main profile instead.
